projects.title: Quasar PCA
projects.subtitle: Reconstructing UV spectra
projects.description: Reconstructed full quasar spectra with PCA and reproduced the mean transmitted flux-redshift relation.
projects.extendedDescription: Implemented spectroscopic analysis in Python and reconstructed complete continuum spectra from partial spectral information.
projects.impact: Recovered full quasar spectra from partial spectral data.

projects.title: Tully-Fisher Regression
projects.subtitle: Galaxy distance model
projects.description: Applied Bayesian regression to account for uncertainty in galaxy velocity and luminosity.
projects.extendedDescription: Compared early and late-type spiral galaxies to test whether separate fits improve distance estimates.
projects.impact: Modeled uncertainty in both variables and compared galaxy populations.

projects.title: NFL Play Prediction
projects.subtitle: 50,000+ plays analyzed
projects.description: Reached 75%+ precision on pivotal NFL play prediction using neural network and random forest models.
projects.extendedDescription: Built feature pipelines to predict fumble probability, classify offensive formations, and identify the features most correlated with pivotal plays.

projects.title: 1D Thermal Conductivity
projects.subtitle: Copper rod heat model
projects.description: Validated heat equation predictions against 1D thermal conductivity data from a copper rod.
projects.extendedDescription: Combined Python analysis with C++ computations to compare measured heat behavior against model predictions.
projects.impact: Confirmed the model by reproducing copper rod heat patterns.
